title: Moderation update: spam & harassment actions
body: Today the mod team reviewed several abuse reports. Two accounts were permanently banned for clear violations: high-volume phishing spam across multiple channels, and sustained targeted harassment of newcomers. A high-severity report against a core maintainer was investigated and determined to be a false-positive driven by brigading; no action was taken on that account. Please continue to use the report tools responsibly and review the community guidelines if you’re unsure whether something crosses the line.
